items.title: Dr. Mustafa Kamal, the Abdullah who rooted for J&K’s pre-1953 position, dies in Srinagar
items.summary: Mustafa Kamal would blame the Congress for embroiling the Kashmir issue by arresting his father and party founder Sheikh Muhammad Abdullah in 1953

items.title: Rep. Ro Khanna on being detained by Israeli settlers in the West Bank
